title: Contentful Content Management API keys should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don’t need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

compliant.description: Using environment variables for Contentful CMA credentials
compliant.code:
import os
from contentful_management import Client

# Load credentials from environment variables
management_token = os.environ.get('CONTENTFUL_MANAGEMENT_TOKEN')

client = Client(management_token)
space = client.spaces().find('space_id')

checks.message: Detected Contentful Content Management API token
